Our Locations

Welcome to Miracle Hospital

Your Journey to Exceptional Care for Women & Children Begins Here

At Miracle Hospital, we’re committed to building a positive, safe, patient-focused culture where your family’s well-being is our utmost priority. What if healthcare for your family wasn’t just a service, but a true partnership? What if world-class expertise in women’s and children’s health felt like the most heartfelt care?

Across Bangalore, a profound dream took root. A dream born from the understanding that healing and nurturing should be accessible, affordable, and deeply compassionate for every mother and child. At Miracle Hospital, we dared to build that dream into a reality across our multiple locations. Step into a place where cutting-edge super-specialty care for women and children meets an unwavering commitment to integrity and warmth. From our humble beginnings, we’ve grown into a beacon of trust, fueled by innovation and a single, powerful promise: to put the well-being of your family at the absolute center of everything we do.

Industry Best Doctors
Our team comprises experienced specialists, many of whom graduated from renowned international medical schools, bringing world-class expertise to your doorstep in Bengaluru.
US Care Standards
We adhere to international and evidence-based treatment protocols and practices, ensuring you receive care that meets the highest global standards.
Our Locations

Accessible Care Across Bengaluru

We are proud to serve families across Bengaluru with our dedicated facilities, ensuring expert women’s and children’s healthcare is always within your reach.

Our Centres of Excellence

Specialized Care, Superior Outcomes for Women & Children

At Miracle Hospital, our Centres of Excellence represent the pinnacle of specialized medical care for women and children. Here, leading specialists, state-of-the-art technology, and a collaborative approach converge to offer comprehensive and advanced treatments for even the most complex conditions.

Our Doctors

Expertise You Can Trust, Care You Can Feel

At Miracle Hospital, our team of dedicated specialists in women’s and children’s health brings unparalleled expertise and a compassionate approach to every patient. We are committed to providing the highest standard of care, ensuring peace of mind for your family.

Dr. Madhusudhan Naidu

Obstetrician, Urogynaecologist and Laparoscopic surgeon

Dr. Bala R

Infertility Specialist, Gynecologist, Reproductive Endocrinologist (Infertility), Obstetrician

Dr. Ravi Shankar Swamy

Paediatrician and
Neonatologist

Dr. Roshni Gurnani

Paediatrician and

Comprehensive Packages

Tailored Health Packages for Your Family

Imagine peace of mind, knowing your family’s health is fully understood and expertly cared for. At Miracle Hospital, we’ve carefully crafted comprehensive health packages designed with mothers, children, and families in mind. They’re more than just tests; they’re your personalized blueprint for well-being.

And here’s the best part: gain this invaluable insight and proactive care at an unbeatable value – almost 50% off! Don’t wait to invest in the healthiest you and your loved ones.

Ready to discover the perfect package for your journey?

Discover More

We are always ready to help you at any time, let’s talk together.

Focus on Healing, Not Bills!

Cashless Treatment

Forget the financial worry. At Miracle Hospital, we believe your journey to recovery and wellness should be smooth, not stressful. That’s why we offer complete cashless facilities, designed for your absolute peace of mind.

We’ve partnered directly with all major corporate insurance providers and TPAs, ensuring a hassle-free process from the moment you step in. Just present your insurance details, and let us handle the rest. Your family’s health is our priority, and seamless care is our promise.

Contact Us
Get in touch

Explore Our Key Procedures: Advanced Care, Simplified.

Your path to healing starts with understanding. Discover some of the common procedures expertly performed at Miracle Hospital, where your safety and comfort are always our priority, guided by NABH standards.

Normal Delivery
Supporting natural childbirth with expert care and compassionate guidance.

C-Section

Customer Testimonials

Miracle Hospital – Best Hospital for Women & Children in Whitefield, Bangalore

I am writing on behalf of my sister, who was recently a patient here. On behalf of our entire family, I want to extend our sincerest gratitude for the help and immense consideration shown to us during what was a very difficult and stressful time. The professional and compassionate care provided by your team was truly exceptional. Again, we thank you deeply for your excellent services.

Rahul Sharma

Patient's Brother, Mumbai
Our family wishes to express our deepest thanks to the staff at Miracle Women and Children's Hospital. My young son's stay was incredibly challenging, but the support and consideration shown by every staff member made the entire process much more manageable. We truly appreciate the kind and professional services rendered during a taxing period for us. Thank you for your dedication and support.

Priya Patel

Concerned Mother, Bangalore
This review is to acknowledge the outstanding and compassionate care received by my mother at your facility. I would like to thank you sincerely for the remarkable help and continuous consideration shown to our family in a time of great concern and anxiety. Your commitment to service went above and beyond our expectations, and we are so grateful. Thank you once again for everything.

Suresh Menon

Relative of Patient, Chennai
On behalf of the entire family of our patient, I am submitting this heartfelt note to thank Miracle Hospital. The kindness, consideration, and exceptional assistance provided to us during a most difficult period were invaluable and deeply appreciated. We sincerely value the high standard of service and the compassionate support delivered by your dedicated team. Thank you very much for your service.

Anjali Singh

Family Spokesperson, Delhi
I want to convey our family's sincere appreciation for the excellent care my cousin received while admitted to your hospital. Thank you for the significant help and unwavering consideration extended to all of us during those challenging days when we needed it most. Your professional services brought us great comfort and relief. We are incredibly thankful for the consistent support shown throughout his treatment journey.

Vikas Reddy

Patient's Family Member, Hyderabad
